violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH. Application provided. Per PIC, 2 employees are in the process of getting registered with RIDOH. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2026

An open employees' beverage container was observed stored in a food preparation area. Employees shall not drink from open beverage containers in order to prevent contamination of their hands, the container, and exposed food. Item was relocated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2026

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the food container storage area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2026

The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by drying rack. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Drying rack relocated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of bio-film. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was turned off. Ice was in process of being disposed of at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024

Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Stagnant water was only 100 degrees. If in stagnant water water must be greater than 135. Water was dumped. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024

At the time of inspection, a working spray bottle of water used for spraying bagels was not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices (Water) must be labeled with the common name of the food. Bottle was labeled at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/16/2023

At the time of inspection, plastic pitchers were observed air drying inverted on top of the ice machine. Pitchers stored on a clean protected surface that is easily cleanable for drying/in between use at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/16/2023
